description: The ReqView project contains requirements for both the current 'T-1000' system and a legacy 'T-800' system. Deprecate all legacy requirements in the SRS document that contain the text 'T-800' in the Description or Heading. For each identified requirement, set the 'Priority' attribute to 'Low' and prepend '[DEPRECATED] ' to the beginning of the Description text. Save the project once all modifications are complete. Do not modify requirements that do not mention 'T-800'.
